creator: sascha@trimind.de
text:
On Wed, Jul 07, 2010 at 06:55:16PM +0300, Aldis Berjoza wrote:
> I can't replicate this on my FreeBSD-8 i386
> Just recently I rebuild all my desktop on FreeBSD-8 amd64 in 32bit jail
> lyx compiled fine... and it works fine as well on my desktop

 Meanwhile, I have updated to 8.0 as well and the current port
versions seem to do fine.  I have no remaining machine running
7.x to check, so this may as well be closed.

Cheers,
-sascha
